meta.name: Stage 2 Codex Runtime Memory Mem0 Proof
meta.description: Proof fixture for Codex runtime_agent execution with a registered local Mem0 memory binding. Requires a local provider registration whose codex_ref is primary_memory.

topic.description: Topic to answer using retrieved memory context when relevant.

intent.summary: Retrieve and write task-relevant long-lived context for the current agent run.

config.local_notes: The portable agent file intentionally contains no local Mem0 paths, credentials, or provider lifecycle instructions.

nodes.prompt: Answer in one concise sentence. Use Dennett memory context if it is provided and relevant. Do not mention provider names, provider configuration, or implementation details.
